title: Huawei QSFP-100G-LR4-eKit, QSFP28 optical module, Single-Mode, 10km, 100G, LC
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / QSFP28
description: Huawei QSFP-100G-LR4-eKit is a single-mode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100Gbps , 4 channels, wavelengths 1295nm, 1300nm, 1304nm, 1309nm and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1295 to 1309 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 4,3 up to 4,5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 8.6 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
